name: pending-followups
question: What pending follow-ups are in CLAUDE.md, and which are overdue?

schema.items: array of {title, due, overdue, days_overdue, detail_path}
schema._detail_path: string|null. Path to the externalized full body, extracted from a `Details: `docs/pending/<slug>.md`` token in the bullet line. Null when the entry's full body remains inline. Lets a triggered consumer go straight to the detail file without re-reading CLAUDE.md.

fallback: Read CLAUDE.md, find the 'Pending Follow-Ups' section, and parse each entry's date manually.
